creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 226348
update emu64 to 5.0.19

Test builds done successfully on {12,13,14}-amd64 and 13-i386. On 13, pkg-plist has errors because of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=255589 – ignoring them for now should be fine.

Patch should apply with `git am`.
